task_completion.description: Identify the duplicate profiles for Elena Fisher.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a search result or customer list displaying two separate profiles for 'Elena Fisher', one with the email elena.f@gmail.com and the other with elena.fisher@arch-design.co.

task_completion.description: Initiate the merge process for the two profiles.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show both Elena Fisher profiles selected and a 'Merge' action being triggered, or the agent navigating into a dedicated merge interface for these two records.

task_completion.description: Select the work profile as the target/primary record.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the merge interface, the profile associated with 'elena.fisher@arch-design.co' is explicitly selected as the master, target, or primary record to keep.

task_completion.description: Ensure both email addresses are retained in the consolidated profile.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The merge preview or the final saved customer profile displays both 'elena.fisher@arch-design.co' and 'elena.f@gmail.com' in the contact information section.

task_completion.description: Verify the work email is set as the primary address.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the final consolidated profile view, 'elena.fisher@arch-design.co' has a visual indicator (such as a 'Primary' label, badge, or star) showing it is the primary email address.

integrity.description: The agent used the graphical user interface of the CRM/admin application to perform the merge.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with a web browser or application GUI (clicking buttons, selecting checkboxes), not terminal commands or direct database queries.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a text editor to spoof the final result.
integrity.visual_evidence: The final profile view is clearly within the application's styled interface, not a plain text file or a manually edited HTML file in an editor.

integrity.description: The agent actually executed the merge rather than just previewing it.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is a success toast/message or a transition from the merge interface back to the consolidated customer profile view, indicating the merge was saved.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Customer Name: Elena Fisher. Target profile email (must be primary): elena.fisher@arch-design.co. Source profile email (must be retained as secondary): elena.f@gmail.com.
